data.title: [ticket transition]: wrong-state error message does not show current state -> confusing error
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Running 'dso ticket transition c836-a027 in_progress closed' when the ticket was actually in 'open' state returned: Error: current status is "open", not "in_progress". While the error is technically correct, orchestrators must issue a separate 'ticket show' call to discover the actual state, adding latency.

## Expected Behavior
The transition command should auto-detect the current state and either (a) transition from the actual current state, or (b) show the full ticket show output alongside the error so the caller can immediately retry with the correct state.

## Actual Behavior
Error message only says what the current state IS, not what transitions are valid. Caller must run ticket show separately.
